---
title: "Untitled"
editor: visual
---

```{r}

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(reactable)
library(reactablefmtr)
library(htmltools)
library(tippy)
library(reactable)
library(tidyr)

# load data
source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/01_functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")

```

```{r}
all_pie_ped_current$Georgia
```
